message:
feat(inference): add marked point process and robust statistics modules

Add mpp.rs module with:
- MarkedPointProcess processor for streaming event analysis
- Burstiness indices (Fano factor, CV of inter-arrival times)
- Mark distribution summaries with TDigest integration
- MppEvidence for evidence ledger integration
- BatchMppAnalyzer for multi-metric analysis
- 9 unit tests plus doc test

Add robust_stats.rs module with:
- Huberized mean/scale
- Trimmed and winsorized means
- Outlier suppression for stable feature extraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
